description: Excellent experience, the fact that is part of a unified system and it doesn't need additional platforms, makes it an easy and approachable website builder. For everyone and with ease, time efficient.
author: Marko S.
pros: I like the relaxed and the overall simplicity of the interface. The fact that my partner, who is not so tech savy managed to build 3 websites alone, using the Godaddy Website Builder is a great point.
cons: Certain interface aspects, such as the lack of extensive code integration. Certain aspects are not easy to tune, such as CSS.

review_title: User Friendly Website Building for Beginners- Customer Service top notch
description: Overall I have had a great experience with Go Daddy. I have my business website through them and also my POS service through them. They have EXCELLENT customer support.
author: Jessica R.
pros: I like Go Daddy Website Builder because it is incredibly user friendly. I was able to get a website up and running fairly quickly to get the basics of my business down. I like how it also tells me how many visitors I have had on the website and how I can add online payments to the website.
cons: It was a bit challenging to add all the pictures I wanted. It was almost like I can only swap out pictures. I did not pay extra to have someone help me, but it is an option. I also had a bit of trouble at first deleting their base website helper information and adding sections. However, once I got the hang of it, I would say it is fairly user friendly.

review_title: AI Support Bots both for Website Creation, and the AI provided for users very limited & unhelpful
description: GoDaddy's AIRO AI Terms of Service did not list the requirement for their host website users a mandatory submission of their email addresses and names in order to use their respective purchased AIRO AI ChatBot service; despite that requirement not being an industry standard as mandatory across other AI service requirements. They were unable to make the modifications to allow this to be an optional setting. They were unable to refund my purchases through GoDaddy of their DNS Hosting services, the Domain Name Purchases, or the LLC requisition they facilitated. Despite this clearly not being listed out in their terms of service, or as an industry acceptable standard for purchased AI service support as mandatory - their inability to alter backend code for what is a relatively very new product on the market - and then would not refund the misrepresented products I was told I was purchasing.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It eliminated many of the granular details and options available on other website building platforms, to be very simple.
cons: They did not comply with their AI Bot Terms of Service, and their limited ability to make changes (as referenced above) on a very standard model that is provided across the industry made any website built very difficult to view for users.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I have been with go daddy for over 10 years and my experience has been nothing but great. They are there for us when we need t hem
author: Adriana R.
pros: The system was easy to use with pre set templates to help build your unique website features. The most important was the amazing customer support we receive whenever we are stuck with something. Cost of website maintenance is very reasonable, you definitely get value for your money.
cons: Sometimes you cannot add multiple pictures on a promotion page, and the menu bar only lets you put a few categories.

review_title: Godaddy did it first! When it comes to domain registar and hosting!
description: Godaddy is the grandfather of domain and hosting and is ab easy tool if you are a beginner in drag and drag websites. Godaddy payments are a plus as well
author: Daniel R. S.
pros: Godaddy is a good platform for no code developers like myself. Although I feel as though wix as more features, Godaddy is my go to platform to teach students how to build websites
cons: I would love for godaddy to have Learning Management Software like Wix. Also sometimes I cannot get rid of the chat box to scroll down while I am editing

description: All in all I would say that I had a smooth experience. It produced great results in the end and my goals and expectations were reached.
author: Tyler C.
pros: Feature rich, easy to use in mobile environments. Stable platform just WORKS and does what it is expected to do.
cons: Cost seems to be higher than other similar platforms for the same features. Lowering price would make it my preferred platform
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Fast and easy to launch, but limited
description: Overall, GoDaddy Website Builder is a good option if your goal is just to get a simple website online quickly and without stress. It did that really well for us but we had to switch to another website builder in the end.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: What I like the most about GoDaddy Website Builder is how fast and easy it is to get a website live. You can literally have something up and running in under an hour, which is a huge win if you just need an online presence quickly.
cons: What I don’t like is how limited it can feel once you want to do more. The customization options can get very restricted, so if you’re looking to build something more advanced, you’ll probably need to use other website builder.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: ALEXANDER G.
pros: Go Daddy has been around for years and always seemed available so I gave them a try and it was an ok experience.
cons: I truthfully didn’t go far enough to get to the more critical features of the website building. It was subpar.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Easy‑to‑Use Builder for Getting Online Fast
description: Overall, my experience with GoDaddy Website Builder was positive. It’s user‑friendly and straightforward, making it easy to create and manage a basic website quickly. While it lacks some advanced customization and scalability, it works well for simple sites and users who want an efficient, low‑learning‑curve solution.
author: Radha S.
pros: What I liked most about GoDaddy Website Builder was how easy it was to use. The drag‑and‑drop interface made it simple to build and update pages without technical knowledge, and the built‑in templates helped get a professional-looking site up quickly.
cons: What I liked least about GoDaddy Website Builder was its limited customization options. While it’s easy to use, the design flexibility can feel restrictive, especially for more complex layouts or advanced features. It also becomes harder to scale or add functionality compared to other website builders.

author: Damian G.
pros: I like how easy and intuitive it is to use its for my clients to setup some basic websites for the brand.
cons: Making it truly no-code sometimes its an issue when migrating it to other platform. Making bigger customizations can be pain.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Did not provide everything my business needs
description: Overall, I think it's a good and affordable tool for someone who has experience or only needs a simple website. It helped me learn and appreciate what goes into making a good website.
author: Crystal H.
pros: GoDaddy was simple to use for someone like myself who has no experience with building a website. I was able to build a simple layout website quickly and without assistance.
cons: GoDaddy lacked a lot of features and plugins such as ADA, which is crucial for me to have. It also felt like it pushed me to hire their professionals, which isn't something I wanted to do. Ultimately, I ended up cancelling the website with them and moved to another company.

description: GoDaddy is easy to use manage and have great prices on public domains
author: James F.
pros: GoDaddy is highly professional looking in all way for growing business
cons: I have no complaints about GoDaddy website builder

review_title: Not my top choice for website builder.
author: Brandi J.
pros: It’s very simple so it’s easy to create a quick website.
cons: It was very basic in customization options. I did not like that the GoDaddy branding was so visible. Took away from my brand image.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I had used it for first few years then moved to Wix mainly due to high cost of custom design. Renewals were more expensive.
author: Rajesh S.
pros: It was early vendor in the market with national presence. It had free domain registration and hosting options.
cons: It’s cost for getting something done was too high. AI features were not enabled at that time causing trouble with making the webpages attractive.

review_title: Good for a first small businesses website
description: I started with godaddy by using their domain search and bought one for my store. It then guided me in steps to get my website online and published
author: Criselen V.
pros: It does a lot of the work for you when it comes to customizing the website, starting with a template and phrases.
cons: Some actions aren’t accessible if you don’t have their premium service which comes at a price. Compared to other website builders this is more affordable though
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Jackie S.
pros: The GoDaddy Website Builder is a great platform to use for anyone to use from all the tools and customer service to the pricing and features it’s perfect, there are a lot of templates to choose from also,
cons: I really don’t have any complaints in regards to the website builder, it has fair prices, payment options.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great customer service and easy to connect with.
author: Phyllis R.
pros: Go Daddy is a user friendly platform. It's easy to setup a new website.
cons: I would like a few more templates however many to choose from.

author: Spencer R.
pros: Very simple and easy to use, allowing me to build something specific that fit my needs.
cons: Learning curve to understand the layout, however once that was passed, everything was clear.

author: Paula C.
pros: GoDaddy allow to transfer out domains at less time when the ticket for transfer is opened.
cons: GoDaddy rejected most payment cards mostly prepaid credit cards.

description: I have secured 4 domains through godaddy. The process was extremely easy. I had someone build my website, but a lot of the features I needed weren't available
author: Gabriel M.
pros: It's simple and easy to secure a domain and email and website through them.
cons: The website was limiting for my type of business.

author: Kimberly R.
pros: First starting out in business, it was one of the first DIY website builders available.
cons: Being a first time website builder when I started, it was difficult to navigate to keep a professional look

review_title: GoDaddy, A Quick Functional Website Builder
description: I needed a quick way to set up a website and Godaddy Website Building was my choice.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The plug-and-play features made it easy to set up my website.
cons: The cost is a little more than I would like to be paying.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: My overall experience with GoDaddy has been great. It’s very intuitive, it made it easy for me as a beginner. It's perfect for anyone who wants a quick, easy way to create a website. For small businesses or personal projects, it’s a solid choice.
author: Bolade A.
pros: GoDaddy is extremely user-friendly. I like the variety of templates available and how customizable they are. That's something I've taken advantage of while building my brand There are also integrated SEO tools helping your site get noticed online, which is a huge bonus.
cons: The downside of GoDaddy is that it's missing some more advanced customization options compared to other platforms. There are some limitations in terms of design flexibility if you want to fully personalize your site beyond the templates.

description: I had questionable customer service I feel like they were trying to upsell me instead of helping me fix my site.
author: Christie V.
pros: I like that you can build your website and add custom plugins
cons: Once the free trial is over you need to remove things that you setup to keep it free

description: Always very easy to use! But, If I do have a problem it quick and easy to call support to ask for help.
author: Bridgett P.
pros: Very easy to use! Makes it fast to update the website when needed.
cons: LOL I can never remember my password to log in.
